name: Reflex Dog Treats - Animal Mix Biscuits 350g
description: Reflex Dog Treats - Animal Mix Biscuits are the perfect size dog biscuits for training and for rewarding good behaviour. Made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. INGREDIENTS: Cereals, Glucose (18.8%), Vegetable Oils & Fats, Minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 7.1 Oil Content (%) - 7.9 Crude Ash (%) - 1.3 Crude Fiber (%) - 2.8 Sodium (%) - 0.3 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Recommended quantity: max. 10 pieces per day. Individual daily requirement depends on other factors, e.g. age, breed and activity. Keep in a dry, cool place.
